sanitizers.expression: wp_kses_post( sprintf( __('If the Turnstile widget is not showing, disable Element Caching for the Elementor form on your page, or set "Load scripts on" to "All pages".', 'simple-cloudflare-turnstile'), 'https://elementor.com/help/element-caching-help/' ) )
wp_kses_post( __( 'If you found this plugin useful, please submit a positive review on WordPress.org.', 'simple-cloudflare-turnstile' ) )
wp_kses_post(__('Cloudflare Turnstile is not currently showing on your forms. Please test the API response on the settings page.', 'simple-cloudflare-turnstile'))
